creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Dixon from comment #1)

I forgot about the libdevq changes when preparing all these patches. I will prepare a patch for that one and open another PR blocking this one. Thanks for the reminder.

Also, there was a libdrm update just before I prepared all the patches, but missed it due to a delay in the announcement appear in the mail list archive. So, now that I've been using libdrm 2.7.43 for a few days, I'll update the patch in this PR as well today.
